content.en:
The other side.

The great war between the Taiwu Sword Sect and the Chilin Clan has reached its final moments.

Bang!!!!!

The Chilin Clan's formations were shattered, countless clansmen were killed, and the Taiwu Sword Sect also used a treasure to block the multidimensional void, so that the Chilin Clan lost the hope of escaping.

Moreover, the most powerful members of the Chilin Clan, the Fourth Realm, were also killed, and it would not be long before the entire Chilin Clan would be wiped out.

At this time.

One of the Fourth Realms of the Chilin Clan said angrily: "Taiwu Sword Sect, if we are given another million extradimensional eras, we can completely master the means of using the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree to kill the enemy, and it is impossible for you to destroy us." "

"Hahaha, our Taiwu Sword Sect naturally knows that your Chilin Clan has recently made some new progress in researching the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree, and can initially mobilize the power of the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree, but unfortunately only a few Fourth Realm can do so. If you are allowed to study it again, even the Fifth Realm may not be able to defeat your Chilin Clan. Our Taiwu Sword Sect and your Chilin Clan are mortal enemies, even if we pay a big price, we must destroy you, otherwise maybe it will be our Taiwu Sword Sect that will be destroyed at that time!" said the sect master of the Taiwu Sword Sect.

"Shoot all of them and kill the last members of the Chilin Clan!"

The Sect Master of the Taiwu Sword Sect ordered.

At this moment, the remaining Fourth Realm of the Chilin Clan and other extradimensional realms all showed their expressions of decision-370.

"Sacrifice!"

They sacrificed themselves one after another, communicated with the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree, and unleashed a final blow that was enough to annihilate everything around them.

This is also what they have just studied, and the news has not been leaked yet, and the Taiwu Sword Sect does not know this hole card of the Chilin Clan.

Rumble!!!!!

A terrifying force erupted, and a turquoise light swept through everything.

The Fourth Realm of the Taiwu Sword Sect showed a look of fear and tried to escape, but the speed of the turquoise light was too fast, and it swept over their bodies in an instant.

In the next moment, these extra-dimensional realms turned into green points of light and dissipated, and even the soul will was completely wiped out.

"No!"

The Supreme Elder of the Taiwu Sword Sect, an invincible superdimensional realm of the fourth realm, was also instantly wiped out by this green light.

Except for the most distant location of the Taiwu Sword Sect's extradimensional realm, the other extradimensional realms close to the location of the Chilin clan were all bombarded, and the Chilin clan was also affected, all of them fell and died, only the few clansmen who were left were still alive.

Distance.

The fourth realm where the Taiwu Sword Sect had survived looked at the area where everything had been annihilated, and they were dumbfounded.

"Nope!

They were all desperate, and now almost eighty percent of the fourth realms of the Taiwu Sword Sect had fallen, and the most powerful fourth realms had fallen.

Now, the Taiwu Sword Sect is no longer a top force, and will be reduced to a medium power.

On the side of the more than 4,000 territories, the big forces with one or two Fourth Realms are called ordinary big forces, and the Fourth Realm with more than dozens of people, but there is no too powerful Fourth Realm, such big forces are called medium big forces.

If the number of the fourth realm reaches three digits, and there is a fourth realm that has passed through the first layer of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Pagoda or above, it can be called a top power.

Before.

The Taiwu Sword Sect is not too powerful among the top powers, but it also has three people who have broken through the fourth realm of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower, and the most powerful one of them has even broken through the third level.

In order to deal with the Chilin Clan, these three Fourth Realms all came, but they all fell at once, and they didn't even have time to escape.

"Get out of here!"

The surviving extradimensional realms of the Taiwu Sword Sect reacted and immediately fled.

Where would they dare to stay after the great loss of strength, and there are many other forces in the Fourth Realm that are spied around, the value of the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree is too great, and it can also perform such a terrifying killing move, anyone wants to seize the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree.

If it was in the past, the strength of the Taiwu Sword Sect would be strong, and it might be able to keep it.

They just wanted to return to the headquarters of the Taiwu Sword Sect, relying on the big array of the headquarters and the hole cards, so that they could avoid this crisis.

......

"The Chilin Clan can indeed urge the Ten-Tailed Treasure Tree to launch a fatal blow, and directly kill all the extra-dimensional realms of the Taiwu Sword Sect that broke into the territory of the Chilin Main Clan. If I hadn't gone, my replica body would have been wiped out. "

Ye Tian didn't worry about the copy body being killed, but once he was killed, the resources he had snatched would be gone.

He didn't continue to participate, this time the power of the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree exploded, not only killing those Fourth Realms, but even destroying those resources, countless resources were turned into ashes.

And this incident is too troublesome, maybe there is any Fifth Realm who is interested in the Ten Dimensional Treasure Tree, he doesn't want to stay here.

As a result, Ye Tian directly left this extradimensional territory.

After returning to the 4,500 Territory, Ye Tian began to practice in retreat.

He took out the ten-dimensional treasure liquid, this time he didn't get much ten-dimensional treasure liquid, it was only more than sixty drops, mainly that the treasure house was only more than one hundred drops of ten-dimensional treasure liquid, and there were only so many under his equal division.

However, he has multi-dimensional wisdom light, soul treasure bottle and many other means, which can completely give full play to the effect of the ten-dimensional treasure liquid, and the extra-dimensional rules will definitely skyrocket.

No one would have such an effect as him, and his more than sixty drops of ten-dimensional treasure liquid might be equivalent to hundreds or even thousands of drops of ten-dimensional treasure liquid in other fourth realms.

"Try the effect of the Ten Dimensional Treasure Liquid!"

Ye Tian swallowed a drop of ten-dimensional treasure liquid, cast a multi-dimensional wisdom light, urged the soul treasure bottle and other means, so that his comprehension was terrifyingly improved, and then used the thirteen-fold blood-colored treasure lotus to analyze and deduce.

Under this operation, Ye Tian's superdimensional rule realm increased at a terrifying speed.

Almost every other extradimensional epoch, he was able to comprehend three to five extradimensional rules.

Before you know it, two hundred extradimensional epochs have passed.

"The Ten Dimensional Treasure Liquid has all been exhausted, and many replica bodies have been sacrificed, but the price is worth it!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

In just two hundred extradimensional eras, he had raised the realm of extradimensional rules to one thousand and sixty-three extradimensional rules, raising the realm of extradimensional rules to the realm of Xiaocheng.

The small success in the realm of extradimensional rules also made his strength increase a lot.

If you fight with that White Bone Realm Lord now, you may be able to threaten the other party, but it is estimated that you are still a little short of breaking the opponent's ten-dimensional treasure shield.
